6-apb.dose_note: NOTE: It is not recommended to consume more than 200mg in a night
formatted_effects: Light to moderate visuals are reported with most users
6-apb.name: 6-apb

properties.after-effects: 6-apb is reported to have a 'hangover' similar to MDMA.
properties.dose: Light: 50-75mg Common: 75-125mg Heavy: 125mg+ | NOTE: It is not recommended to consume more than 200mg in a night
properties.effects: Feelings of empathy, euphoria, and a general sense of well being. Light to moderate visuals are also reported with most users.
properties.summary: A stimulant, empathogen and analog of MDA. Typically more visual than MDMA or MDA, as well as having a much longer onset and duration. Users often report a slightly more psychedelic headspace as well. Commonly sold as an alternative to MDMA and MDA.
